# Beudox HR - Technical Context for AI Assistants

## Architecture Overview

Beudox HR is a single-page application (SPA) built with React and TypeScript, using Vite as the build tool. It follows a component-based architecture with clear separation of concerns:

- **Frontend**: React SPA with client-side routing
- **Backend**: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Edge Functions)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with shadcn/ui component system
- **State Management**: TanStack Query for server state, React Context for auth

## Key Architectural Patterns

### Component Organization
- **Atomic Design**: UI components range from basic atoms (buttons, inputs) to complex organisms (forms, layouts)
- **Feature-based Structure**: Components grouped by feature (evaluations/, settings/, etc.)
- **Layout Components**: AppLayout provides consistent navigation and structure

### Data Flow
- **TanStack Query**: Handles all API calls with caching, background refetching, and optimistic updates
- **Supabase Client**: Centralized in `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts`
- **Real-time Updates**: Leverages Supabase's real-time capabilities for live data

### Authentication & Authorization
- **Role-based Access**: Implemented via `src/lib/role-access.ts` with hierarchical permissions
- **Protected Routes**: Route-level protection with automatic redirects
- **Session Management**: Persistent auth state with automatic token refresh

## Database Schema (Key Tables)

Based on Supabase migrations, the core schema includes:

### Core Entities
- **employees**: User profiles with role assignments
- **companies**: Multi-tenant company data
- **departments**: Organizational structure
- **roles**: Permission definitions

### HR Features
- **evaluations**: Quarterly performance reviews
- **daily_evaluations**: Daily feedback system
- **hr_policies**: Rich text policy documents
- **attendance_records**: Time tracking

### Business Features
- **projects**: Project management
- **clients**: Client relationships
- **invoices**: Billing system
- **loans**: Employee loan tracking

### Supporting Tables
- **public_holidays**: Company holiday calendar
- **evaluation_parameters**: Configurable evaluation criteria

## Key Files & Their Purposes

### Entry Points
- `src/main.tsx`: Application bootstrap with React 18 strict mode
- `src/App.tsx`: Main routing configuration and providers
- `src/pages/Index.tsx`: Placeholder root page (not actively used)

### Core Components
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx`: Main application shell with sidebar navigation
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx`: Navigation menu with role-based visibility
- `src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx`: User menu and global actions

### Authentication
- `src/hooks/useAuth.tsx`: Auth context and session management
- `src/pages/Login.tsx`: Authentication interface
- `src/pages/SetPassword.tsx`: Password setup for invited users

### Feature Components
- `src/components/evaluations/EvaluationTimeline.tsx`: Displays evaluation history with filtering
- `src/components/hr-policies/RichTextEditor.tsx`: Tiptap-based rich text editing
- `src/components/SearchableEmployeeSelect.tsx`: Employee selection with search/filter

### Utilities
- `src/lib/utils.ts`: Common utility functions (cn for class merging)
- `src/lib/role-access.ts`: Permission checking logic
- `src/lib/format-role.ts`: Role display formatting

### Integrations
- `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts`: Supabase client configuration
- `src/integrations/supabase/types.ts`: Auto-generated TypeScript types

## Business Logic Patterns

### Evaluation System
- **Quarterly Evaluations**: Formal performance reviews with recommendations (HR/CEO only)
- **Daily Evaluations**: Peer feedback system with directional ratings
- **Visibility Rules**: Role-based access to evaluation data
- **Timeline Display**: Unified view of all evaluation types with sorting

### Employee Management
- **Profile Views**: Different data visibility based on viewer role and relationship
- **Invite System**: Email-based employee onboarding
- **Avatar Management**: Image upload with cropping

### Settings Management
- **Tabbed Interface**: Organized configuration sections
- **Validation**: Form validation with Zod schemas
- **Real-time Updates**: Immediate UI feedback for changes

## Routing Structure

The application uses React Router with nested routes:

- `/` → Redirect to dashboard or login
- `/login` → Authentication
- `/dashboard` → Main dashboard
- `/employees/*` → Employee CRUD operations
- `/evaluations/*` → Performance management
- `/hr-policies/*` → Policy document management
- `/projects/*` → Project management
- `/clients/*` → Client management
- `/invoices/*` → Billing system
- `/settings` → System configuration

## State Management Strategy

- **Server State**: TanStack Query manages all API data with intelligent caching
- **Local State**: React useState for UI interactions
- **Global State**: Auth context for user session
- **Form State**: React Hook Form for complex forms

## Testing Strategy

- **Unit Tests**: Vitest for component and utility testing
- **E2E Tests**: Playwright for critical user flows
- **Component Testing**: React Testing Library for interaction testing

## Performance Considerations

- **Code Splitting**: Vite handles automatic chunking
- **Image Optimization**: Lazy loading and responsive images
- **Query Optimization**: TanStack Query prevents unnecessary requests
- **Real-time Efficiency**: Targeted subscriptions for live updates

## Development Workflow

- **Hot Reload**: Vite provides instant feedback
- **Type Safety**: TypeScript with strict mode
- **Code Quality**: ESLint with React and TypeScript rules
- **Styling**: Tailwind with design system tokens

## Deployment

- **Build Process**: `vite build` creates optimized bundles
- **Static Hosting**: Can be deployed to any static host (Vercel, Netlify, etc.)
- **Environment Variables**: Supabase configuration via Vite env vars
